miapi.module.chisel.description: A sturdy metal chisel for chipping away at rocks.
miapi.module.chisel.name: [translation.[material.translation]]Chisel
miapi.module.claymore.name: [translation.[material.translation]]Highland Claymore
miapi.module.counterweight.description: A weighty cap at the base of your rod. Balances the tool making it easier to swing.
miapi.module.counterweight_socket.descri: A counterweight with pretty gems inside. Gemstone not included.
miapi.module.halberd.description: A versatile polearm with excellent reach.
miapi.module.halberd.name: [translation.[material.translation]]Halberd
miapi.module.handle_grip.description: A comfy grip for your tool. Mostly cosmetic.
miapi.module.handle_grip_polearm.descrip: A comfy grip for your polearm. Now your other hand won't feel left out.
miapi.module.mace.description: A Hefty mace to help deal with the skeletons in the closet.
miapi.module.mace.name: [translation.[material.translation]]Mace
miapi.module.propick.name: [translation.[material.translation]]Propick
miapi.module.propick_back.description: A small pick designed to dig and pry at rocks. Use it to prospect for ore.
miapi.module.propick_front.description: A small pick designed to dig and pry at rocks. Use it to prospect for ore.
miapi.module.saw.description: A toothy blade for neatly sawing through wood.
miapi.module.saw.name: [translation.[material.translation]]Wood Saw
miapi.module.scabbard.description: Protects your body from your blade and your blade from the elements.
miapi.module.smithing_hammer.description: A hammer designed for smithing. Cheaper than a sledgehammer but can't mine.
miapi.module.smithing_hammer.name: [translation.[material.translation]]Smithing Hammer
miapi.module.warhammer.description: Not to be confused with the franchise.
miapi.module.warhammer.name: [translation.[material.translation]]Warhammer
miapi.slot.claymore_fashion.name: Claymore Band
miapi.slot.polearm_fashion.name: Polearm Detailing
miapi.slot.scabbard.name: Scabbard
